hero.caption: The Jaguar is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Jaguar.

baby.alt: A young or baby Jaguar showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Jaguars must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.caption: While often solitary, some Jaguars interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Jaguar traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.
